title: mikania nodulosa
intro: Mikania nodulosa, also known as the hairy mile-a-minute vine or hairy Mikania, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy and sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania nodulosa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Mikania nodulosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
